changeSet.author: dave
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE code_languages ( id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY, slug TEXT NOT NULL, name TEXT NOT NULL, initial_script TEXT, editor_id TEXT NOT NULL,
CONSTRAINT uk_code_languages_slug UNIQUE (slug), CONSTRAINT uk_code_languages_editor_id UNIQUE (editor_id) );

changeSet.author: dave
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE tags ( id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY, slug TEXT NOT NULL, name TEXT NOT NULL, code_language_id BIGINT,
CONSTRAINT uk_subjects_slug UNIQUE (slug), CONSTRAINT fk_subjects_code_language FOREIGN KEY (code_language_id) REFERENCES code_languages(id) );

changeSet.author: dave
dave
changeSet.sql:
ALTER TABLE course ADD COLUMN course_type course_type NOT NULL DEFAULT 'COURSE', ADD COLUMN subject_id BIGINT NOT NULL;
ALTER TABLE course ADD CONSTRAINT fk_course_subject FOREIGN KEY (subject_id) REFERENCES tags(id);

changeSet.author: dave
dave
